title: Fifth Third Bancorp 2025 Form 10-K / Annual Report
note: Primary source for 2025 business description, assets, net income, profitability, risk factors, and segment context.

title: Fifth Third Bancorp Investor Relations
note: Company investor-relations portal used to corroborate issuer identity and financial reporting context.

title: Fifth Third Bancorp Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for approximate public equity market capitalization.

title: Fifth Third Bank P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for trailing price-to-earnings ratio near the review date.

title: Fifth Third Bancorp Statistics
note: Secondary market-data source used to cross-check market capitalization and valuation figures.

title: Fifth Third Checking Accounts
note: Product source for consumer checking account positioning and features.

title: Commercial Banking | Fifth Third Bank
note: Product source for commercial banking, treasury management, payments, and capital-markets positioning.

title: How Fedimint Works
note: Explains Bitcoin-backed federated e-cash, guardian custody, and Lightning interoperability.

title: How Federations Work
note: Documents guardian coordination and Lightning gateway mechanics for federations.

title: Fedimint Technical Reference
note: Developer documentation for Fedimint implementation details.

title: Fedimint GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for the Fedimint federated e-cash project.

title: GNU Taler Documentation
note: Technical documentation for the GNU Taler free-software electronic payment system.

title: GNU Taler Merchant Backend Operator Manual
note: Merchant-backend documentation relevant to open merchant payment acceptance.

title: Apache Fineract Platform Documentation
note: Documentation for open-source core banking functionality and deployment considerations.

title: Apache Fineract GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for Apache Fineract open-source core banking software.

title: Mifos X
note: Documents Mifos X and its use of Apache Fineract for digital financial services and financial inclusion.
